description_long: This is a disposable takeaway cup with a white plastic lid and a tapered cylindrical body, commonly used for hot beverages like coffee or tea. The cup features a colorful printed design, including palm trees, a sunset, and the text 'Golden Palm Resort' on one side, suggesting a tropical or vacation theme. Prominent branding and logos are visible, along with environmental and recycling symbols, and a responsible gambling message. The lid has a small drinking spout and a raised rim for secure attachment to the cup. The surface finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of coated paper or plastic cups. The cup is lightweight and designed for single use, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, parks, or street vendors.
description: A disposable takeaway cup with a white plastic lid, colorful branding, and tropical-themed artwork. The cup is smooth, lightweight, and designed for hot beverages.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the cup with environmental and recycling symbols, a trash bin icon, and part of the tropical artwork.
description_view_1: This view highlights the responsible gambling message 'When the Fun Stops, Stop' in bold yellow and black text.
description_view_2: This view displays the 'Golden Palm Resort' logo with palm trees and a sunset, as well as the Blue Anchor logo.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the main branding with two palm trees, a sunset, and the 'Golden Palm Resort' text in the center.
